description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named wasm_docker that runs on push to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, caches Docker images, installs UV for Python, compiles fastled.js, fastled.wasm, and index.html, scans for artifacts, checks for required files, generates a timestamp and random hex, uploads wasm artifacts, and installs Playwright to verify onFastLedFrame functionality.
